name: Peanut Butter Ho Ho Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 Duncan Hines Devil's Food Cake Mix
1 can Betty Crocker Creamy Deluxe Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cake mix according to package instructions and bake in a 9-inch by 13-inch cake pan. Let cool.
2. In a large bowl, cream together the butter, Crisco, and sugar until light and fluffy. Add milk, flour, and peanut butter, blending until well combined and smooth.
3. Once the frosting is fully chilled, remove the foil lid from the can of frosting. Microwave for 5-8 seconds, stirring occasionally, until it reaches a pourable consistency (no more than 30 seconds).
4. Spread the cooled frosting evenly over the chilled cake. Refrigerate again until the frosting is set.
5. Enjoy!
